status: Ralph Loop Iteration 7: Production Deployment Automation & Health Monitoring System
summary: Ralph Iteration 7: Implemented comprehensive production deployment automation with health monitoring system. Added healthMonitoring.ts (300+ lines) with API checks, UI verification, performance tracking, and storage monitoring. Created deploymentRollback.ts (300+ lines) with deployment versioning, health check tracking, and automatic rollback capabilities. Enhanced CI/CD pipeline with pre-deployment checks, automated production deployments, and post-deployment verification. Added 52 new tests covering health monitoring and rollback functionality. All 982 tests passing (100% success rate). Zero TypeScript errors. Production build successful (60.74 kB gzipped, 406ms build time). Complete deployment automation infrastructure now ready for production.
